WASD move  |  SHIFT run  |  MOUSE orbit  |  SCROLL zoom  |  Q season  |  T time skip  |  E interact/trade/fish/hunt  |  F eat  |  J drink  |  G sleep  |  K cook (near fire)  |  V first person  |  I inventory  |  1-10 craft · 1-10 cook · 1-8 trade  |  Trader wagon east of homestead  |  Trade for salt to preserve food  |  Trade for cloth+rope → craft Canvas Jacket (click in workbench, best warmth)  |  Trade for iron nails → upgrade workbench (click) → craft Iron Axe (2× durability, fastest chop)  |  Weather changes every few hours — rain fills water tank · clouds cut solar · stay warm in bad weather  |  Craft Beehive (4 wood + 3 fiber, click [↓] at workbench) → E harvest honey after ~48h (restores ALL vitals, never spoils)  |  Compost: carry rot (spoiled food) → E at empty garden bed → 25% faster crop growth  |  Fog varies with weather — clear=open, cloudy=reduced, rain=low visibility; thickens at night  |  Planting: spring + summer only — frost blocks seeds in fall/winter (compost beds in winter, plant come spring)  |  Smoking Rack: craft at workbench (4 wood + 2 nails, click [↓]) → deposit venison/trout/mushrooms at rack [E] → collect smoked food after 4–8 game-hours — no salt needed, sovereign preservation  |  Elk: northeast meadow — walk slowly (sprint spooks), 3 hits [E] to down · drops 4-6 venison + elk hide · craft Winter Coat (1 elk hide + 6 fiber, click [↓]) = best warmth (−72% drain)
